pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17 bytecode, failing to utilize Java 21 features or meet the target JDK requirement.

src/main/java/maven/Loader.java.general_idea: Replace deprecated URL constructor with URI.create().toURL() to comply with stricter security checks in newer JDKs.
src/main/java/maven/Loader.java.why_exists: The URL(String) constructor is deprecated for removal in JDK 21 and may throw SecurityException or fail validation for certain URI schemes in strict security managers; using URI.create().toURL() is the recommended safe alternative.
